/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -march=native -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Wl,-pie -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Wl,-dead_strip_dylibs -Wl,-rpath,/Users/shirshendusekharmondal/anaconda3/lib -L/Users/shirshendusekharmondal/anaconda3/lib CMakeFiles/quantum_ps.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quantum_ps.dir/src/BackgroundCosmology.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quantum_ps.dir/src/TransferFunction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quantum_ps.dir/src/PowerSpectrum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quantum_ps.dir/src/QuantumQFT.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quantum_ps.dir/src/GalaxyCatalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quantum_ps.dir/src/LandySzalay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quantum_ps.dir/src/FKPEstimator.cpp.o -o quantum_ps  /Users/shirshendusekharmondal/anaconda3/lib/libfftw3.dylib -lm /Users/shirshendusekharmondal/anaconda3/lib/libomp.dylib
